testCase.name: FindUserDto should be defined
FindUserDto should have username property
FindUserDto validation should pass validation with valid username
FindUserDto validation should fail validation with empty username
FindUserDto validation should fail validation with username too short
FindUserDto validation should fail validation with username too long
FindUserDto validation should fail validation with non-string username
UserRegisterDto should be defined
UserRegisterDto should extend BaseUserDto
UserRegisterDto validation should pass validation with valid data
UserRegisterDto validation should fail validation with invalid email
UserRegisterDto validation should fail validation with short password
FilterEquipamentoDto should be valid with all optional fields
FilterEquipamentoDto should be valid with minimal fields
FilterEquipamentoDto should be valid with empty dto (default values)
FilterEquipamentoDto page validation should be invalid with page less than 1
FilterEquipamentoDto page validation should be invalid with page as string
FilterEquipamentoDto page validation should be valid with page = 1
FilterEquipamentoDto page validation should be valid with page = 100
FilterEquipamentoDto limit validation should be invalid with limit less than 1
FilterEquipamentoDto limit validation should be invalid with limit greater than 100
FilterEquipamentoDto limit validation should be invalid with limit as string
FilterEquipamentoDto limit validation should be valid with limit = 1
FilterEquipamentoDto limit validation should be valid with limit = 100
FilterEquipamentoDto statusOperacional validation should be valid with valid status
FilterEquipamentoDto statusOperacional validation should be valid with DISPONIVEL status
FilterEquipamentoDto statusOperacional validation should be valid with EM_MANUTENCAO status
FilterEquipamentoDto statusOperacional validation should be valid with INATIVO status
FilterEquipamentoDto statusOperacional validation should be valid with SUCATEADO status
FilterEquipamentoDto statusOperacional validation should be invalid with invalid status
FilterEquipamentoDto string field validation should be valid with string fields
FilterEquipamentoDto string field validation should be valid with empty string fields
FilterEquipamentoDto string field validation should be invalid with non-string fields
CreateEquipamentoDto should be valid with required fields
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid without required fields
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid with empty nome
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid with nome too short
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid with nome too long
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid with invalid statusOperacional
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid with negative valorAquisicao
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid with negative vidaUtilEstimativa
CreateEquipamentoDto should be invalid with invalid UUID userId
CreateEquipamentoDto should be valid with valid UUID userId
CreateEquipamentoDto fabricante validation should be valid with valid fabricante
CreateEquipamentoDto fabricante validation should be invalid with empty fabricante
CreateEquipamentoDto fabricante validation should be invalid with fabricante too short
CreateEquipamentoDto fabricante validation should be invalid with fabricante too long
UpdateStatusDto should be valid with valid statusOperacional
UpdateStatusDto should be invalid without statusOperacional
UpdateStatusDto should be invalid with invalid statusOperacional
UpdateStatusDto should be valid with all status values
FilterEquipamentoDto should be valid with all optional fields
FilterEquipamentoDto should be valid with empty dto
FilterEquipamentoDto should be invalid with negative page
FilterEquipamentoDto should be invalid with zero page
FilterEquipamentoDto should be invalid with negative limit
FilterEquipamentoDto should be invalid with zero limit
FilterEquipamentoDto should be invalid with invalid statusOperacional
RedisCacheService should be defined
RedisCacheService should return null from getJson when key does not exist
RedisCacheService should return parsed value from getJson
RedisCacheService should call set when setJson is called
RedisCacheService should call del when del is called
RedisCacheService should disconnect on destroy
RedisCacheService should not disconnect if client was never created
AppController root should be defined
AppService should be defined
AppService should return health status with correct properties
User should be defined
User should have all required properties
User should handle different user types
UserTypesGuard should allow access if no types are required
UserTypesGuard should throw ForbiddenException if user type is not allowed
UserTypesGuard should allow access if user type is in the allowed list
JwtStrategy validate should return user data without password when user exists
JwtStrategy validate should return null when user does not exist
JwtStrategy validate should handle errors from userService
AuthService register should successfully register a new user
AuthService register should throw ConflictException when username already exists
AuthService register should throw ConflictException when email already exists
AuthService register should handle errors during user creation
AuthService register should handle errors during JWT signing
AuthService register should handle errors during username check
AuthService register should handle errors during email check
AuthService validateUser should successfully validate user with correct credentials
AuthService validateUser should throw UnauthorizedException when user does not exist
AuthService validateUser should throw UnauthorizedException when password is incorrect
AuthService validateUser should handle errors during user lookup
AuthService validateUser should handle errors during password comparison
AuthService validateUser should validate user with empty password field
AuthService login should successfully generate login response
AuthService login should handle errors during JWT signing in login
AuthService login should work with user object containing extra properties
AuthService login should handle user with null or undefined properties
AuthService login should handle minimal user object
AuthService service initialization should be defined
AuthService service initialization should have userService dependency
AuthService service initialization should have jwtService dependency
UserService should be defined
UserService create should create a new user with hashed password
UserService create should throw ConflictException if username already exists
UserService create should throw ConflictException if email already exists
UserService create should use default tipo if not provided
UserService create should throw an error if user creation fails
UserService create should throw an error if password hashing fails
UserService findByUsername should return user when found by username
UserService findByUsername should return null when user not found by username
UserService findByUsername should throw an error if database query fails
UserService findByEmail should return user when found by email
UserService findByEmail should return null when user not found by email
UserService findByEmail should throw an error if database query fails
UserService findById should return user when found by id
UserService findById should return null when user not found by id
UserService findById should throw an error if database query fails
UserService findAll should return all users without password
UserService findAll should return empty array when no users exist
UserService findAll should throw an error if database query fails
UserService findOne should return cached user on cache hit
UserService findOne should return user when found by id
UserService findOne should throw NotFoundException when user not found
UserService findOne should throw an error if database query fails
UserService update should update user successfully
UserService update should throw NotFoundException when user not found
UserService update should throw ConflictException when username already exists
UserService update should throw ConflictException when email already exists
UserService update should not check username/email if they are not being changed
UserService update should not hash password if not provided
UserService remove should remove user successfully
UserService remove should throw NotFoundException when user not found
UserService remove should throw an error if database query fails
UserController getMyProfile should return user profile without password if user exists
UserController getMyProfile should return message if user not found
UserController getProtectedData should return protected data with user and timestamp
UserController create should create a user
UserController findAll should return all users
UserController findOne should return user by id
UserController update should update user
UserController remove should remove user
UserController getMyProfile - error handling should handle service errors
AuthController register should register a new user
AuthController register should throw error if registration fails
AuthController login should login user and return JWT token
AuthController login should throw error if login fails
AuthController getProfile should return user profile
AuthController verifyToken should verify token and return user data
PrismaModule should be defined
PrismaModule should provide PrismaService
PrismaService should be defined
PrismaService should have $connect and $disconnect methods
PrismaService should call $connect on onModuleInit
PrismaService should call $disconnect on onModuleDestroy
UserModule should be defined
UserModule should provide UserService
AuthModule Module Configuration should be defined
AuthModule Module Configuration should have AuthController
AuthModule Module Configuration should have AuthService
AuthModule Module Configuration should have JwtService
AuthModule Module Configuration should have JwtStrategy
AuthModule Module Configuration should have JwtAuthGuard
AuthModule Module Configuration should have ConfigService
AuthModule JWT Configuration should configure JWT with correct secret from ConfigService
AuthModule JWT Configuration should configure JWT with correct expiration from ConfigService
AuthModule JWT Configuration should use default expiration when not provided
AuthModule Module Dependencies should configure JwtModule with async registration
AuthModule Module Dependencies should have PassportModule configured
AuthModule Exports should export AuthService
AuthModule Exports should export JwtAuthGuard
AuthModule Integration Tests should create module with all dependencies resolved
AuthModule Integration Tests should handle missing JWT_SECRET gracefully
AuthModule Error Handling should handle ConfigService errors gracefully
BlobCsvService should upload using Connection String (Local Flow)
BlobCsvService should throw ServiceUnavailableException if no config is found
BlobCsvService should parse connection string correctly or throw error
EquipamentosService should be defined
EquipamentosService create should create an equipamento successfully
EquipamentosService create should throw BadRequestException when user not found
EquipamentosService create should create equipamento without userId
EquipamentosService findAll should return paginated equipamentos
EquipamentosService findAll should return equipamentos without filters
EquipamentosService exportCsvToBlob should correctly escape CSV fields and format dates
EquipamentosService exportCsvToBlob should upload CSV with BOM and header when there are no equipamentos
EquipamentosService exportCsvToBlob should include data rows with filters and no pagination in uploaded buffer
EquipamentosService exportCsvToBlob should escape fields containing commas in uploaded buffer
EquipamentosService findOne should return cached equipamento on cache hit
EquipamentosService findOne should return equipamento by id
EquipamentosService findOne should throw NotFoundException when equipamento not found
EquipamentosService update should set dates and userId to null when provided as null in updateDto
EquipamentosService update should update equipamento successfully
EquipamentosService update should update equipamento with optional fields
EquipamentosService update should throw NotFoundException when equipamento not found
EquipamentosService update should throw BadRequestException when user not found
EquipamentosService updateStatus should update status successfully
EquipamentosService updateStatus should throw NotFoundException when equipamento not found
EquipamentosService remove should remove equipamento successfully
EquipamentosService remove should throw NotFoundException when equipamento not found
EquipamentosService findAll - additional filter tests should build where clause with all filters
EquipamentosService findAll - additional filter tests should filter equipamentos by tipo
EquipamentosService findAll - additional filter tests should filter equipamentos by setorAtual
EquipamentosService findAll - additional filter tests should filter equipamentos by statusOperacional
EquipamentosService update - additional field tests should update equipamento with all fields
EquipamentosController exportCsv should call service and send buffer via response
EquipamentosController exportCsv should call service with undefined when no query is provided
EquipamentosController create should create an equipamento
EquipamentosController findAll should return equipamentos
EquipamentosController findOne should return one equipamento
EquipamentosModule should be defined
EquipamentosModule should provide EquipamentosController
EquipamentosModule should provide EquipamentosService
